---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Scope
What parts of the project does this task affect? (e.g., codebase, documentation, dependencies)

## Impact
What is the impact of not completing this task? (e.g., technical debt, performance issues, security risks)

## Proposed Action
A clear and concise description of what needs to be done.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or information about the maintenance task here.
